Outbound HTTP webhook deliveries from Run a Call to subscriber URLs.

**Authentication.** Every POST carries `Run-A-Call-Signature: t=<unix>,v1=<hex>`.
The signed string is `${ts}.${raw_body}`. Verify with HMAC-SHA256 against the
subscription secret. Reject if `Math.abs(now - t) > 5 minutes` to defeat
replay attacks.

**Deduplication.** Each delivery's `event.id` (header
`Run-A-Call-Event-Id`, also in the JSON body) is stable across retries
of the same logical event. Store the last N event ids you've processed
and dedupe before applying business logic.

**Retry policy.** Subscriber returns 2xx within 10 seconds → success.
Anything else (non-2xx, timeout, network error) is retried up to 3 total
attempts with default Inngest backoff. After 10 consecutive terminal
failures, the subscription is auto-paused and the org owner is emailed.
Resume from /settings/integrations/webhooks/{id}.

**Concurrency.** Run a Call caps fan-out at 100 matching subscriptions
per single internal event and concurrent deliveries at 50 in-flight per
function — beyond that, the system bails rather than fan out unbounded.

A bearer-authenticated REST API for pushing data into and pulling data out of **[Run a Call](https://runacall.com)** — the field service platform built for small-to-mid HVAC companies.

Use it to migrate from your old CRM, sync data with accounting tools, fire Zapier / Make / n8n flows on real-time events, or wire your own custom scripts. Same surface internally — no second-class endpoints.

## Quick start

```bash
curl https://api.runacall.com/v1/customers \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer rkc_live_..."
```

Generate a key from **[Settings → Integrations → API](https://app.runacall.com/settings/integrations/api)**. The token is shown once at creation — store it in a secret manager.

## Authentication

Every request needs an `Authorization: Bearer rkc_live_...` header.

| Scope | Grants |
|---|---|
| `read` | All `GET` endpoints |
| `write` | `POST` and `PATCH` on customers / properties / equipment / jobs / memberships |

Keys are SHA-256 hashed at rest. The raw token is shown to the org owner exactly once at creation; we cannot retrieve it later.

## Tenant isolation

Every request is scoped to the organization that owns the bearer token. Cross-org reads return **404 (not 403)** to mask existence. There's no admin scope and no DELETE endpoints anywhere — soft-delete remains a UI-only operation.

## Rate limits

| Layer | Limit | Window |
|---|---|---|
| Per key — sustained | 60 req | 1 min rolling |
| Per key — burst | 120 req | 10 s rolling |
| Per org — all keys combined | 300 req | 1 min rolling |
| Concurrent in-flight | 5 | — |

Exceeding any layer returns **429** with a `Retry-After` header. Founders can raise a known integrator's limit via per-key override — email **admin@runacall.com**.

## Idempotency: upsert by external_id

Every writable resource (customers, properties, equipment, jobs, memberships) accepts `external_id` + `external_source`. POSTing the same pair twice **upserts** the existing row (returns 200 with the same id) instead of creating a duplicate (201). Safe to retry, safe to script bulk imports against.

## Pagination

Cursor-based, never offset. Pass back the `next_cursor` from a response as `?starting_after=<cursor>` to fetch the next page.

```json
{
  "data": [ /* up to 100 items */ ],
  "has_more": true,
  "next_cursor": "MjAyNi0wNS0wN1QwODo1OTowMi4xMjIzNDQrMDA6MDB8MzZhNTlmMDQ"
}
```

Default page size 50, hard cap 100.

## Errors

Every error is the same envelope:

```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_request",
    "message": "external_id is required when upserting",
    "doc_url": "https://docs.runacall.com/#errors-invalid_request",
    "request_id": "req_a93a7817f5a8485d80204becea"
  }
}
```

Quote `request_id` when reaching out for support — it correlates to our audit log.

| Code | Status | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `invalid_request` | 400 / 422 | Body or query validation failed |
| `unauthorized` | 401 | Missing or invalid bearer token |
| `forbidden` | 403 | Token lacks the required scope |
| `not_found` | 404 | Resource doesn't exist (or belongs to another org) |
| `conflict` | 409 | Concurrent upsert race lost — retry will hit the existing row |
| `rate_limited` | 429 | Layer exceeded — see `Retry-After` |
| `internal_error` | 500 | Bug on our end — quote the request_id |

## Webhooks

Subscribe a URL via **[Settings → Integrations → Webhooks](https://app.runacall.com/settings/integrations/webhooks)** to receive real-time events for customers, jobs, estimates, invoices, payments, voice calls, and memberships. Deliveries are **HMAC-SHA256 signed** over `\${ts}.\${raw_body}` with the signature in the `Run-A-Call-Signature` header. See the **Webhooks** section in the sidebar for the full event catalog + delivery contract.
